initialUserPrompt: I need to update the CORS settings in the FastApi application. Specifically, I need to modify the `main.py` file in the `bridge` directory to ensure that `allow_credentials` is set to `True` for `CORS` middleware.

items.name: Inform user about aiohttp instead of FastAPI
Add CORS middleware to aiohttp application in bridge/harvester.py
Set allow_credentials to True for CORS in bridge/harvester.py
